## What & why

Briefly, what does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v` passes.
- [ ] `python3 tools/pack.py --check` passes (or I repacked and committed the archive).
- [ ] If I touched the engine/themes/slides, I rebuilt and committed `template/index.html`.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (Python standard library only).
- [ ] Updated docs/`CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed.
